title: triticum cereale var. aestivum
intro: Triticum cereale var. aestivum, also known as winter wheat, is a cultivated plant that belongs to the family Poaceae and is a subspecies of the wild wheat species. The medicinal properties of Triticum cereale var. aestivum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels and its potential to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of consuming this plant are numerous, including lowering the risk of heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, as well as improving digestion and reducing symptoms of menopause. Triticum cereale var. aestivum can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and flour, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
